properties.documentation: Blazor WebAssembly SPA hosted by Azure Static Web Apps.
Framework-neutral app services, API clients, localization, and auth state.
Shared wire-contract library referenced by the SPA, app-core, and API.
.NET isolated Azure Functions backend.
Versioned HTTP surface consumed by the SPA. Unversioned aliases remain present in the Functions source.
Battle.net login/callback/logout and current-user session surface.
Create, list, inspect, edit, delete, sign up for, and cancel signup for runs.
Guild read/update and admin management surface.
Current-user profile, character management, enrichment, and cleanup.
Read and refresh static WoW reference data.
Health/readiness, privacy contact, and admin migration endpoints.
Blazor pages for /runs, /runs/{RunId}, /runs/new, and /runs/{RunId}/edit.
External OAuth service used for login and callback exchange.
External Blizzard profile and guild data API.
External Blizzard static game-data API used by reference-data refresh.
External image URL source for character render assets.
Free SKU Static Web App hosting the Blazor app.
Function App with system-assigned managed identity.
Dynamic Y1 plan used by the Function App.
.NET 10 isolated worker on Azure Functions v4.
System-assigned identity and RBAC access path for data-plane resources.
Free-tier Cosmos account with local auth disabled.
LFM logical database.
Run documents, partitioned by id.
Raider documents, partitioned by Battle.net id.
Guild documents, partitioned by guild id.
Idempotency replay records for mutating HTTP requests.
Standard_LRS StorageV2 account with shared key access disabled.
Blob container content under reference/{kind}/ for static Blizzard reference data.
Durable ASP.NET Data Protection key-ring storage.
RBAC-enabled vault for app secrets and Data Protection key encryption.
Versionless Key Vault key URI used to wrap Data Protection keys.
Workspace-based telemetry component.
Shared workspace for diagnostics and Application Insights.
Metric alert and action group for Cosmos throttling.
Main branch source, infrastructure, and app artifacts before deployment.
Single production environment represented by deploy workflow and environment tags.
Difference closed by the production deploy workflow.
Push or manual deploy event targeting production.
Orchestrator workflow for infra and app deployment.
Reusable workflow that runs Bicep what-if/apply.
Reusable workflow that builds Functions zip and Blazor wwwroot artifacts.
Reusable workflow that uploads the backend and frontend artifacts.
Infrastructure definition delivered by the deploy-infra workflow.
Backend deployable package.
Frontend static bundle.
